metaTitle: Importance of Electrical Safety Inspection in Australia | Carelabs
metaDescription: Electrical safety inspection helps you to prevent any mishaps due to issues with your electrical system and maintain safety standards.
h2: Where Proactive Safety Meets Power Engineering
paragraphs: Keeping your business premise safe, whether it is your industrial plant, house, business, or commercial property, it is your responsibility for safety. Either you are an owner of business property or commercial premises are legally obliged to ensure that the property is safe and fit for relevant use.

You know, eliminating and reducing the electrical threat is still the main concern of several industries. Electrical safety inspection helps you to detect the issues relevant to the electrical system and saving further unnecessary expenses which can be caused by malfunction or damage of expensive equipment.

Several times, there are problems related to the electrical installations and equipment which is hard to notice from outside that why performing an electrical safety inspection is always a smart decision.
Identify damage, electrical faults, wear and tear in the electrical system can easily be done by electrical periodical inspection and testing .

As a general rule, hostile operating environments used electrical equipment should be tested at least once every 12 months. Recommended guidelines for a safety inspection and testing of electrical equipment AS/NZS 3760-2010.

An electrical inspection helps you to prevent future mishaps due to issues with your electrical system that can cause hazardous incidents, malfunction, or fire. There is always a threat when you neglect electric maintenance and requirements.
The electrical inspection ensures each equipment and electrical installation provides smooth disruption-free and smooth functioning of industry operations. So, having an EICR is always a good option.
Figure.1: Electricity kills in the 12 years of span data.

On the past 28th of March, a friend of our technician employee, contact us to perform an electrical safety inspection on their property. We perform visual inspection then, as usual, went for testing and found improper wiring, which can be devastating in future times.

Carelabs technician performs an electrical safety inspection and delivers the clients a quality work in small TAT. After that important electrical safety inspection, our technician provides him a digital inspection report, for the guarantee the safety of their employee, as well as equipment.

If he (a friend of our employee) can do that, then why not you. Having an electrical safety inspection, not only helps you in taking responsibility for employee’s safety, as well as saves your further expenses, which can be caused due to fault or damage to expensive equipment.
Benefits which you can take advantage of, choosing Carelabs services for your safety concern.

AS/NZS 3760 is an Australian Standard having goal is to ensure the workplace or facilities are safe by setting recommendations about testing 240 volts, three-phase, and low voltage electrical equipment.
Figure.2: An electrician must have updated with these six blocks before practice.
It leads you to test and tagging for a safe work environment. It is mandatory to keep yourself updated with the current standard and regulations AS/NZS 3760.
We offer qualified technicians to ensure your safety of your workplace as well as your employees. Carelabs complying with Australian Standards AS/NZS 3760.
Carelabs offer electrical safety inspection in Australia services in all the major cities of Queensland, New South Wales, South Australia, Victoria, Tasmania, and Western Australia.
